blurb: A native daisy — lavender-blue rays around a gold eye, blooming for months.
spread: Clumping; spreads slowly by rhizomes into colonies
seasons: Lavender-blue daisies Jun–Oct; very long bloom
wildlife: Exceptional pollinator plant — bees, butterflies & more; sulphur butterfly nectar
